ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the instance was last updated */,
  "instance_type" TEXT /* Type of the instance (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "max_episodes" INTEGER /* Maximum number of episodes allowed for the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_name" TEXT /* Name of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode ended */,
  "episode_type" TEXT /* Type of the episode (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* RL algorithm used by the agent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (e.g., Q-learning, SARSA, DQN) */,
  "agent_status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., active, inactive, training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_episodes" (
  "agent_episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent-episode pair */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "return" REAL /* Return achieved by the agent in the episode */,
  "discounted_return" REAL /* Discounted return achieved by the agent in the episode */,
  "agent_episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the agent-episode pair (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "num_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken by the agent in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_episodes_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_episodes_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "agent_episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent-episode pair */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "state_type" TEXT /* Type of the state (e.g., initial, intermediate, terminal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_agent_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_episode_id") REFERENCES agent_episodes ("agent_episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "agent_episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent-episode pair */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., move forward, turn left, turn right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_agent_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_episode_id") REFERENCES agent_episodes ("agent_episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "agent_episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent-episode pair */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Value of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., positive, negative, zero) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_agent_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_episode_id") REFERENCES agent_episodes ("agent_episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instance being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the RL algorithm */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES agents ("algorithm")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "return" REAL /* Return achieved by the agent in the episode */,
  "discounted_return" REAL /* Discounted return achieved by the agent in the episode */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to assess the agent's performance (e.g., return, discounted return) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_values" (
  "action_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action value */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the action for the agent in the episode */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the action value (e.g., Q-value, advantage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_values_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_values_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_values_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_values" (
  "state_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state value */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the state for the agent in the episode */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the state value (e.g., V-value, advantage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_values_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_values_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_values_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
